claim_support.reason: All material claims in the report are supported by the content of the cited evidence chunks. The text accurately reflects the information provided in the evidence pack, such as revenue figures, margin percentages, and news headlines.

numerical_accuracy.reason: All financial figures, growth rates, margins, and stock performance metrics in the report match the provided evidence and calculation objects exactly or within acceptable rounding conventions (e.g., Q4 Revenue $113.9B vs $113,896M, FCF Margin 21.56% vs 0.21555).

citation_precision.reason: The authoritative cited chunk IDs listed under each paragraph correctly correspond to the evidence blocks provided. There are no mismatches between the cited IDs and the available evidence content.

temporal_validity.reason: Severe temporal violation detected. The report is dated 2026-02-03, but Recent Developments Paragraph 1 cites evidence [b581551f-f2c2-46bf-824b-5026e0e3ae96] with a source_date of 2026-02-04T00:00:00Z to support claims about Visible Alpha consensus revisions. Using post-as-of information breaks the temporal validity gate.

consistency.reason: The report is internally consistent. Financial figures (Revenue, Margins, Employee Count) are repeated accurately across different sections (Company Overview, Financial Analysis, Business & Competitive Analysis) without contradiction.
